sentence: Never ask for the ETL on a falasha.

wombos.definition: A false, misinformed narrative delivered with full confidence — someone telling you something that is clearly incorrect and based on bad information. A brainwashed saga presented as fact.
Estimated time of loreain — the projected time it will take to fully explain the lore of a topic.
wombos.example: Before you start, what's the ETL on this whole situation?
